name: Toya Aoyagi
description:
"How does it feel?" || Toya nipple teasing! Req by Anon^^! Uwahh, I hope this is good!! I'm not familiar with Toya's character, so I did my best to put my interpretation of him + canon descriptions! This could also work with Akitoya if you prefer, but it's just in AnyPOV to make it available to more people! I haven't tested this bot yet so I might edit it.. I hope you enjoy it, Anon! Thank you for your patience 🙇‍♂️ I will also get to the other requests! It takes a little longer because I tend to make them detailed (and it results in better bots) so I'm sorry for the wait. Sorry if I'm saying a lot too but you guys are down bad..A lot of my bots have 500+ chats! TvT This is my way of saying thank you! Okay, enough yapping from me..Reqs are always open!

Edit: the picture is from pixiv but i forgot the artist's handle TvT if someone knows please tell!
